name: Elk Township Recreation Park
description: Come play pickleball at Elk Township Recreation Park in Elk, NJ! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Ella Harris Park
description: Two pickleball courts on one tennis court

name: Four Seasons Pickleball
description: Experience our state-of-the-art facilities, where you can play regardless of the weather. Our temperature-controlled environment ensures comfort—rain or shine. With Pro-Cushion® courts, we minimize the impact on knees, ankles, hips, and feet, allowing for extended playtime while reducing fatigue. All six of our indoor pickleball courts are surrounded by four-foot fencing to make sure errant balls are contained within your playing area, allowing you to concentrate on your match without interference from adjacent players.

name: Gloucester County YMCA
description: Gloucester County YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Woodbury, NJ. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and water. You can reserve the courts. A membership is required to play.

name: James G. Atkinson Memorial Park
description: Use Meetup app to book play

name: MaxFit and Sports
description: MaxFit and Sports is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Glassboro, NJ. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to lights.

name: New Street Park
description: Come play pickleball at New Street Park in Glassboro, NJ! There are 9 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: The Rec Center at St. Matthew's
description: The Rec Center at St. Matthew's is a place to play pickleball in Monroe, NJ. There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to lights.
open_play_schedule: Meetup App must be used to attend pickleball sessions.

name: Total Turf Experience
description: Total Turf Experience is a place to play pickleball in Pitman, NJ. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. Reservations are available.
